title: MedAgentBenchScore
description: Score artifact for the first-party clean-room MedAgentBench-style benchmark (Mechanical Inventory B2): multi-step physician tasks in a benchmark-scoped virtual FHIR EHR, testing the trunk TOPOLOGY. Written to benchmark/medagent/scores/latest.json. Benchmark metadata, NOT a verification/medicolegal record. MA.1 writes the INERT (driver-pending) form; MA.2 fills the scored fields.

ehr_conformance.description: Sandbox seed-conformance summary (how many seeded resources are AU-Core conformant), reported at MA.1 to prove the sandbox validates.

armed.description: true only once the pipeline driver is wired (MA.2) AND the corpus is clinician-attested. SKIP-inert (false) until then.

task_success_rate.description: Fraction of attested tasks the agent completed correctly (scored, MA.2).

invariant_adherence_rate.description: Fraction of attested tasks completed with NO invariant breach (no fabricated code/dose, grounding held, HARD_FAIL respected). HARD gate == 1.00 (MA.2).
